name: rho
description: Connect Codex to Rho's trusted scientific runtime for R workspaces, objects, runs, plots, problems, approvals, and provenance.

interface.longDescription: Use Codex for reasoning while Rho owns persistent R state, safe execution, semantic object inspection, artifacts, and provenance.
defaultPrompt: Connect this project to Rho and inspect its scientific workspace
Run this R analysis in Rho and report provenance
